creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
And igb + !AESNI + INVARIANTS — looks very similar to em!

panic: Assertion (staterr & E1000_RXD_STAT_DD) != 0 failed at /data/src/sys/dev/e1000/igb_txrx.c:451
